name: Ask Finance Anything
description: Answers ANY finance question by having an LLM translate it to SQL and query the finance database. Use this as a catch-all for questions the specific skills (get-transactions, get-balances, filter-transactions, spending-summary) don't cover. Perfect for nuanced questions like 'how much did I spend on coffee in March', 'what's my average grocery bill', 'recurring subscriptions', 'month-over-month comparisons', or any custom analysis. The question parameter is required.
author: Michael

question.description: A natural language question about finances. Be specific - include date ranges, categories, accounts, or amounts when relevant. Examples: 'How much did I spend at Starbucks last month?', 'What are my recurring subscriptions?', 'Compare my April and May spending by category'.
